description_long: This is a classical-style marble bust sculpture depicting a bearded male figure with curly hair and a solemn expression. The bust is finely detailed, with realistic facial features, textured hair, and a draped garment over the shoulders. The sculpture is mounted on a round pedestal base, which adds to its stately appearance. The back of the bust is smoothly finished, with the garment's folds and contours visible. The surface appears to be slightly weathered, giving it an authentic, aged look. The overall coloration is a pale, off-white typical of marble, with subtle variations and some darker patina in recessed areas.
description: A detailed marble bust of a bearded man with curly hair, draped in classical attire and mounted on a round pedestal. The sculpture features realistic facial details and a smooth, pale stone finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, curly hair, and draped garment of the bust.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the depth of the hair, and the curvature of the garment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the smooth finish of the garment.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, with the beard and garment folds visible.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
